breakdown: This PR adds a RewardsBox TypedDict and validate_rewards_box() function with comprehensive tests. The naming is excellent throughout (descriptive test names, clear function/variable names). Error handling uses boolean returns for invalid inputs but lacks typed errors or detailed messages. Type safety is the core goal—tests verify TypedDict existence and field validation. Architecture cleanly separates custom_types module from tests with no circular dependencies. Test coverage is thorough with 11 tests covering valid data, missing fields, wrong types, extra fields, and non-dict inputs. Documentation is strong with docstrings on all test classes and methods.
key_changes: Added test_rewards_box_schema.py with comprehensive validation tests
Added RewardsBox TypedDict definition in custom_types.py
Added new_level and source_id field type validation
